'''''Backstab'' 33''' is the thirty-third issue of the French [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] magazine [[Backstab (magazine)|''Backstab'']]. It was released in [[September]] [[2001]].

==Contents==
*"[[Étoiles, gardez-vous!... ...des jeunes gens idéalistes qui aiment trop le sport]]"
